title: Jules Merger Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the jules-merger-skill agent orchestration.

target_branch.description: The base branch to branch off of and merge into (e.g., main, master, develop).

test_command.description: The exact shell command used to run the project's test suite.

lint_command.description: The exact shell command used to run linters or static analysis.

auto_fix_attempts.description: Maximum number of times the agent should attempt to auto-fix failing tests or lint errors.

require_human_review_for.description: Categories or keywords that immediately trigger a Draft PR without auto-merging.
